# `draw.fibChannel`

> **Stability:** experimental
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `other`
> **Wire kind:** `fib-channel`

Draw a Fibonacci channel — parallel translates of `line(anchors[0],
anchors[1])` at fib-ratio offsets through `anchors[2]`. Mirrors
invinite's `fib-channel-tool.ts` shape.

## Anchors

`anchors` — `[A, B, C]` triple

Anchor count: 3.

## Signature

```ts
function fibChannel(anchors: AnchorTriple, opts?: FibOpts): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.fibChannel(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.fibChannel demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.fibChannel(
                [
                    { time: bar.time, price: bar.low },
                    { time: bar.time, price: bar.high },
                    { time: bar.time, price: bar.close },
                ],
                { showLabels: true },
            );
        },
    });
```
